issues.description: Missing condition: 'LeaderIsName' or 'LeaderHasType' to check if Leader is [Tony Tony.Chopper]. The DSL applies the boost to all own Characters unconditionally, but the card text requires the Leader to be Chopper.
Target scope should be 'AllOwnCharactersWithType' or filtered to [Tony Tony.Chopper] Characters only. Currently 'AllOwnCharacters' applies the boost to all Characters, not just Chopper characters.

Rest action should be a cost (conditional requirement), not an effect action. The syntax '[Activate: Main] You may rest this Character' indicates resting is optional/part of activation cost, not a consequence.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn' but should be explicitly 'DuringYourTurn' since it applies only on your turn.
